name: GoldHaven Resources Corp.
description: GoldHaven Resources Corp. is a Canadian junior exploration company focused on acquiring and exploring highly prospective precious metals projects in Tier 1 mining jurisdictions. The company's primary focus is on its extensive portfolio in the Maricunga Gold Belt of Chile, where it holds several promising targets including the Rio-2 and Alicia projects. GoldHaven leverages a disciplined exploration approach and a management team with significant experience in discovery and development to unlock value from its strategic land positions in world-class mining districts.
